title: Cinematic F-35 Aegean Sortie
description: An IMAX-grade, high-speed aerial shot of an F-35 Lightning II jet flying low over the Greek Cyclades islands with a cinematic Top Gun aesthetic.

shot.type: cockpit POV + external chase cam hybrid
shot.subject: F-35 Lightning II fighter jet
shot.action: extreme low-altitude high-speed sortie, banking aggressively between Greek islands
shot.camera_movement: dynamic tracking shot, rapid push-ins, wing-mounted POV transitions, 180° barrel roll follow

environment.landmarks: white-washed villages with blue domes, dramatic limestone cliffs, caldera formations, scattered fishing boats
environment.sea: deep cobalt blue with sun-glittered surface, jet wash rippling the water below
environment.sky: clear with scattered cumulus clouds, golden hour light
environment.atmosphere: heat shimmer, vapor cones forming on wing surfaces, salt spray haze

cinematography.style: Top Gun: Maverick aesthetic, IMAX-grade aerial photography
cinematography.lens: anamorphic wide 35mm with shallow depth on cockpit shots
cinematography.color_grade: teal and orange, high contrast, sun-bleached highlights
cinematography.lighting: natural golden hour, lens flares from low sun angle, rim light on fuselage
cinematography.frame_rate: 24fps with selective 120fps slow-motion on banking moments

sound_design_cue.audio: thunderous afterburner roar, sonic boom transitions, doppler shift as jet passes camera, low rumbling score

details.aircraft: F-35A in standard gray livery, weapons bay closed, full afterburner with visible heat distortion
details.effects: wingtip vortices, condensation trails, sea spray kicked up at lowest passes, shadow racing across island terrain
details.ground_elements: stunned tourists looking up, goats scattering, laundry blowing on village clotheslines
